title: olea aquifolium var. rotundifolia
intro: Olea aquifolium var. rotundifolia, also known as the holly olive, is a plant species belonging to the family Oleaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The holly olive is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the holly olive plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
